2026-04-21JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for OntarioAppointment of Grace Alcaide Janicas of the City of Sudbury, in the Province of Ontario, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of Grace Alcaide Janicas of the City of Sudbury, in the Province of Ontario, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
